caption: The video shows a person playing a video game, specifically navigating through a menu titled "UNOPENED PACKS." The screen displays various types of packs available to open, including "UT PRESENT," "SMALL PRESENT," "LOVELY PRESENT," and "BLITZ PRESENT," each with different quantities. The player is currently highlighting the "UT PRESENT" pack, which has four available. The interface also shows the player's in-game currency and level information at the top right corner. In the bottom left corner, there is a small inset showing the player, who appears to be wearing headphones and speaking into a microphone, likely providing commentary or reacting to the game. The background includes a festive Christmas tree, suggesting a holiday-themed setting.
